title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by seniority
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Published medians are Junior IC n=63 at S$54,000; Mid-level IC n=56 at S$75,800; Senior IC n=52 at S$119,500; Lead / Staff / Principal IC n=19 at S$103,200; and People Manager n=23 at S$139,100. Subgroups below n=10 are suppressed. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Values are self-reported total compensation medians. Cohorts below n=10 are not published, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
